data.name: HOPELESS JUNCTION: cuppy dog barf girl and co.
data.detailed_description:
Hopeless Junction is a remaster of an award winning kinetic visual novel. The story follows a bunch of tgirls on a week-long journey on the world famous transcontinental train, 'The Starline Junction Express'.

During these seven days on board, when meeting a girl with a mysterious air to her, Kalinda takes the opportunity to try and be bold for the first time in her life.

When the mysterious girl, Zarina, ends up being a mean sadist, what ensues is drunken bullying and sexual chaos that even pulls in Kalinda's closest friend and sister, Chandra, into this confusing whirlpool of conflicting emotions.

Weird gay sex, utter confusion, heart wrenching panic and life altering trauma.

Please enjoy it.

HOPELESS JUNCTION: cuppy dog barf girl and co. Features:

  • Remastered version of the beloved story, the plot remains the same but many scenes have been fixed up and dialogue improved on. New ones fitted in, too.

  • ALL NEW ART! THIS TIME WITH COLOURS AND STUFF! Experience Barf Girl in FULL HD.

  • Scripting improvements left and right! These lil' dorks are coming alive with Ren'Py magic!!

  • But most importantly; Finally, Cuppy Dog Plushie Humping epilogue.


Now Wishlish and Follow HOPELESS JUNCTION: cuppy dog barf girl and co. on Steam or Cuppy Dog will be sad.

data.short_description: Weird gay sex, utter confusion, heart wrenching panic and life altering trauma. A kinetic visual novel about a bunch of tgirls on a week-long journey on a world famous transcontinental train.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
